contract_scope: Client-to-server envelope for semantic retrieval. Consumed by POST /api/retrieve (#R-10). The query is embedded via the embedding worker, then compared against stored vectors via brute-force cosine similarity.
honesty_rules: query is a single string. The backend embeds it using the model_selector's embedding model before searching.
document_ids is optional. When null or omitted, all indexed documents are searched. When provided, only vectors belonging to those documents are scanned.
top_k caps the number of results returned. Results below min_score are excluded before top_k truncation.
Search strategy is brute_force_cosine. No approximate nearest neighbor (HNSW/IVF) is implemented; this is an honest linear scan.
Returned scores are raw cosine similarity values in [-1, 1]. For L2-normalized vectors (default from POST /api/embed), scores are in [0, 1].

rejection_codes.invalid_request_envelope: any required field missing or out of range
rejection_codes.model_not_found: no embedding model matches the selector
